metadata.title: Loma Serena – Hilltop Homes & Lots with Ocean Views in Rosarito, Baja CA
metadata.description: Loma Serena is a hillside residential community in Rosarito offering breathtaking views of the Pacific Ocean. Discover homes and lots in one of Baja California's most scenic coastal settings.

hero.subheadline: Gated community in Rosarito offering modern homes & ocean views, plus a more affordable cost of living than the U.S.

models.heading: Explore our 4 models
features: Fully equipped kitchen with large pantry

cta.body: Designed for those who seek more than just a residence, these 98 exclusive houses offer refined living spaces, breathtaking views, and a sense of community unlike any other. Every home is crafted to deliver comfort, elegance, and lasting value.
